description: Pauses playback for a specified duration in seconds. Optionally supports inline notes, media, and shape reference icon placement during the pause. Useful for allowing time to read annotations or listen to audio during playback.
utility: Pause playback for a specified duration

arguments.name: duration
arguments.description: Duration of pause in seconds (must be positive)

arguments.name: notes
arguments.description: Optional notes text with optional color and fill color styling

arguments.name: media
arguments.description: Optional media (audio/video) to play during pause

arguments.name: ref
arguments.description: Optional reference to existing shape for icon placement

alternates.description: Pause with icon placed near shape p1
Pause with both annotations and audio

examples.scenario: Pause with icon next to shape
Full pause with notes and media
